/usr/bin/ar qc libetclib.a CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/drivers/temperature_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/drivers/pressure_sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/drivers/battery_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/comm/crc16.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/comm/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/comm/uart_sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/device/state_machine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/device/device_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/device/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/etclib.dir/src/storage/eeprom_sim.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libetclib.a
